default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Diagnose and plan a fix for the Inner World blog's broken URL structure.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Broken URLs Block Indexing:** A Prismic routing feature creates two URLs for each blog (e.g., `/reflections/title` and `/category/title`), confusing Google and preventing new articles from indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [**Outdated Sitemap Compounds Damage:** The sitemap is not synced with the live site, failing to signal URL changes and further delaying Google's discovery of new content.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [**Immediate Fix:** The Prismic routing logic must be removed. This requires a code change, not a manual redirect, as the issue is in the application's routing layer.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [**Client Communication Failure:** Inner World's internal communication failure between the SEO team and developer Ilya caused this issue. The developer implemented an outdated plan (from Aug/Sep) despite a new, simpler URL structure being agreed upon in October.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Broken Blog URLs & Indexing

  - [**Root Cause:** A Prismic feature, implemented by developer Ilya, automatically adds a category slug to blog URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Result:** This creates two live URLs for every article, breaking the intended `/reflections/blog-title` structure.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [**Impact:** Google is confused by the multiple paths and has stopped indexing new articles published in the last month.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Compounding Factor:** An outdated sitemap fails to signal URL changes to Google, further delaying discovery and indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

### Diagnosis: Routing Logic & Indexing Behavior

  - [**Mechanism:** The site's codebase contains two active routes for blog articles:](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [`/reflections/[slug]` → The correct, intended path.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [`/[category]/[slug]` → The incorrect path created by the Prismic feature.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [**Google's Behavior:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [Older articles (e.g., from Oct 31) were eventually indexed under the incorrect `/category/slug` path.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
      - [Newer articles (from Nov) are not indexing at all, likely due to the sitemap's failure to signal their existence or URL changes.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [**Unpublished Articles:** Three articles staged by GrowthX on Oct 31 were never published by Inner World, explaining why they were not found in Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)

### Solution: Fix Routing & Sync Sitemap

  - [**Priority 1: Fix Routing Logic**](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Action:** Remove the Prismic feature that adds the category slug.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Method:** This is a code change to the application's routing logic, not a manual redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This eliminates the duplicate URLs and establishes a single, canonical path.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [**Priority 2: Sync Sitemap**](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Action:** Update the sitemap to reflect the live site's correct URL structure.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Rationale:** An accurate sitemap is critical for signaling changes to Google and accelerating the indexing of new content.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Israel:** Provide Matthew with a summary of the diagnosis and recommended fix priorities via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=3487.0)
  - [**Matthew:** Use Israel's summary to brief Jacob and Inner World on the issue and the required technical solution.](https://fathom.video/share/zzmRVMUY6qGoEygT66sa_EbSHLGxrsuM?tab=summary&timestamp=3487.0)

action_items.description: Review SEO standards/canonical/sitemap/robots; post Slack summary to Matthew; then Matthew syncs Jacob, briefs NOL
